exported_types.name: Result
exported_types.notes: MatchCounts is keyed by rule name; only populated for RuleKindMatch rules.

exported_types.name: Evaluation
exported_types.notes: OrderedRuleNames reflects the sort-by-priority-then-name order applied at evaluation time.

exported_functions.name: Evaluate
exported_functions.notes: Returns error if pack.Validate() fails or if any candidate fails admission.Evaluate. No partial results.

internal_functions.name: admitWinners
internal_functions.notes: Tie-break: higher Confidence wins; equal Confidence breaks by lexicographic ID (lower wins). Loser gets RejectionReasonLostTieBreak appended.

internal_functions.name: compareCandidates
internal_functions.notes: Returns cmp.Compare(right.Confidence, left.Confidence) for confidence (descending), then cmp.Compare(left.ID, right.ID) for ID (ascending).

internal_functions.name: boundedMatchCount
internal_functions.notes: Returns available if maxMatches <= 0 or available <= maxMatches; otherwise returns maxMatches.

result_sort.description: slices.SortFunc by (CorrelationKey ascending, State with admitted first, ID ascending)

telemetry: none — pure function; callers attach telemetry
notes: Evaluate returns an error and no partial results if pack.Validate() or candidate.Validate() fails.
MatchCounts is populated only for RuleKindMatch rules; non-match rules do not add entries.
Tie-break is deterministic: higher confidence wins; equal confidence resolved by lower lexicographic ID.
Output ordering is part of the contract: explain rendering and tests rely on stable result order.
RejectionReasons from both confidence and structural checks are appended in that order (confidence first, structural second).
